title: Garden
description: a clientside-only mod pack for my paper plugin server!
body:
## Gabriel's Garden Enhance your experience on Gabriel's Garden with the Garden Modpack, designed for the Gabriel's Garden 1.20.1 Paper Minecraft Server. Powered by Quilt, this modpack not only optimizes gameplay but also adds delightful Qol Mods. Any Questions or need assistance? Contact us on Discord.
Feedback


Mod List

Check out the mods I'm using!
